office_does: Port commissioners set policy and budgets for port facilities, development, cleanup, and waterfront property.
race_blurb: Six candidates seek District 4; the rubric defines no axes applicable to Port.

candidates.summary: Commercial fisherman and longtime firefighter emphasizing jobs, infrastructure, marine trades, and transparency.
Technology manager and former fire commissioner balancing commerce and environmental protection.
Financial planner focused on port losses, cleanup, and communication.
highlights: Combines finance, maritime logistics, and board experience [S2][S3]

candidates.summary: Logistics manager emphasizing development, stewardship, and maritime jobs.
Fishing business owner emphasizing accountable management and waterfront investment.
Policy aide emphasizing jobs, agriculture, business, and stakeholder balance.
